note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right heel wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 3 pressure ulcer Right heel measures 4.6 cm x 3.3 cm x 1.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 38% slough, 62% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: light. Odor: none.
Assessment: Stage 3 pressure ulcer Right heel — improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Physician notified of wound progression.

Pt seen for wound eval. Pressure Ulcer Right heel measures aprx 4.6 x 3.3cm, depth 1.2cm.
Min drainage serous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 2.8x2.0, 0.6cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
